description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Golang Lint and Unit Test - collector that runs on pull requests to specific branches and paths, and can be triggered manually. The workflow consists of three jobs: format, lint, and build. The format job checks out the code, sets up Go 1.18, and formats the go-client directory. The lint job depends on format, checks out the code, sets up Go 1.18, and runs golangci-lint on the collector directory. The build job depends on lint, checks out the code, sets up Go 1.18, and builds the collector directory using make.
